name: Chantico Mexican Restaurant Phoenix
notes: Crispy beef tacos are the move. Start with the Saguaro Cooler cocktail. Outdoor sunset dining is really good.
address: 1051 E Camelback Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85014, USA

name: Spitz - Desert Ridge Marketplace - Restaurant and Bar - Mediterranean Food,
notes: Street Cart Fries are the standout — keep an eye on your order. Doner bowls and wraps are solid fusion Mediterranean.
address: 21001 N Tatum Blvd Ste 34-1140, Phoenix, AZ 85050, USA

name: Hamburguesas Y Cervezas
notes: Mexican inspired hamburgers. Would recommend the al pastor wings. $4 margaritas on happy hours
address: 888 N 1st Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85003, USA

name: Throne Brewing & Pizza Kitchen
notes: Very good mac and cheese. Not a bad place to meet before a Suns game.
address: 1326 N Central Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85004, USA

name: Tortas CM
notes: Chicken torta is the move — chicken cooked with vegetables so the flavor soaks in. Specialty sauces include spicy ketchup. Parking can be tricky.
address: 13971 N 59th Ave, Glendale, AZ 85306, USA

name: Tacos Chiwas Chandler
notes: Chihuahua-style tacos with a corn-flour hybrid tortilla you won't find anywhere else in the valley. Go for the gorditas. The meat comes in actual chunks — not the usual mystery shred.
address: 2160 N Alma School Rd, Chandler, AZ 85224, USA

name: Phila Deli AZ
notes: Mom and pop sub spot. Owner breaks down the whole menu for you. The Italian sub and Philly cheesesteak are the anchors.
address: 20219 N 59th Ave Ste a-3, Glendale, AZ 85308, USA

name: Leo’s Tacos & Burritos
notes: Birria burger
address: 10277 W McDowell Rd Ste 100, Avondale, AZ 85392, USA

name: Angel's Trumpet Ale House
notes: They dry their wings in rice flour
address: 810 N 2nd St, Phoenix, AZ 85004, USA

name: Stellar 66 Chinese restaurant and bar
notes: Peking Duck
address: 1817 E Baseline Rd #103, Gilbert, AZ 85233, USA

name: Santo Arcadia
notes: Birria dumplings. Short rib
address: 4418 E Osborn Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85018, USA

name: Phat Turtle KC BBQ & Billiards
notes: KC-style BBQ in Cave Creek. Brisket sandwich and pulled pork are the move. Pool tables, sports bar atmosphere.
address: 30845 N Cave Creek Rd Ste 107, Cave Creek, AZ 85331, USA

name: CC's on Central
notes: Want to go. Praline French toast. Shrimp etouffe. Some good looking chicken wings
address: 2800 N Central Ave A100, Phoenix, AZ 85004, USA

name: The Rosticceria
address: 12811 N Tatum Blvd, Scottsdale, AZ 85254, USA

name: Fuego at The Clarendon
notes: Rooftop Mexican at the Clarendon hotel. Chile relleno is solid. Live music outside most nights. Happy hour available.
address: 401 W Clarendon Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85013, USA

name: Juanderful Tacos
notes: Known for homemade tortillas. The meats are solid and quesadillas are meaty. Cash preferred to avoid card fees.
address: 3650 W Camelback Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85019, USA

name: AZ Chimney Cakes
notes: Chimney cone desserts — cinnamon sugar cone with Bavarian cream is the move. Near a movie theater.
address: 1055 N Dobson Rd #104, Mesa, AZ 85201, USA
dishes: cinnamon sugar cone with bavarian cream

name: Pocha 54 Korean Tapas
notes: Korean tapas
address: 5415 E High St Ste 101, Phoenix, AZ 85054, USA

name: Crisp Premium Pizza
notes: Square pizza imported with Italian ingredients. On the salty side. Worth it for NY-style crispy squares.
address: 7111 E 5th Ave F, Scottsdale, AZ 85251, USA

name: Then Burger
notes: Birria burger and a flight of complimentary sauces. The elote is an app worth getting.
address: 9220 W Glendale Ave, Glendale, AZ 85305, USA

name: Tomaso's on Camelback
notes: Italian since 1977. Meatballs look good.
address: 3225 E Camelback Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85018, USA

name: Hānai Coffee + Cocktails
notes: Upscale-ish coffee shop that's not what it looks like from outside. Good drinks and rotating menu. Good spot to hang out.
address: 3648 W Southern Ave #150, Phoenix, AZ 85041, USA

name: Chick-A-Dee
notes: Thai street food
address: 49 W Thomas Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85013, USA

name: Garden Bar Phx
notes: Seasonal cocktails - make a reservation. Small
address: 822 N 6th Ave, Phoenix, AZ 85003, USA

name: The Genuine
notes: Wood fire pizza and good cocktails in a stylish neighborhood bar. Bocce ball and DJs. Good brunch too.
address: 6015 N 16th St, Phoenix, AZ 85016, USA

name: Aimee's Swine House
notes: Johnny Cakes are the thing to get here. Unique takes on breakfast items. Small local spot.
address: 1609 E Bell Rd Ste B4, Phoenix, AZ 85022, USA

name: The Garfield Phoenix
notes: Horchatta. Burrito.
address: 924 E Roosevelt St, Phoenix, AZ 85006, USA

name: Desert Drinks & Exotics
notes: Foreign sodas and snack place
address: 1902 E McDowell Rd, Phoenix, AZ 85006, USA

name: The Bar (Gilbert)
notes: Pulp Fiction mural on the wall. Royale with Cheese burger and chicken satay are good. $1 wings on Wednesdays with karaoke.
address: 366 N Gilbert Rd, Gilbert, AZ 85234, USA

name: The Golden Pineapple Craft Lounge
notes: Locally sourced bar food with a rotating menu. Navajo fry bread tostada is a standout. Good Bloody Mary and creative cocktails.
address: 2700 S Mill Ave, Tempe, AZ 85282, USA

name: Maritza's Pupusas
notes: Salvadoran spot in Queen Creek. Hot, fresh pupusas made to order. People drive for these.
address: 1532 W Ocotillo Rd, Queen Creek, AZ 85140, USA

name: Wingz And Thingz
notes: Soul food wings spot in Avondale. Came up on TikTok. Wings and collard greens get the love. Owner is hands-on.
address: 12301 W Buckeye Rd, Avondale, AZ 85323, USA

name: Mora Italian
notes: Elevated Italian osteria by Scott Conant. Chef's tasting menu is a good deal. Do reservations. Free valet.
address: 5651 N 7th St, Phoenix, AZ 85014, USA

name: Original Golden Skone
notes: Fry bread sandwiches — kind of like a soft bready taco. The beef and bean skone topped with salsa, lettuce, and cheese is the one. Cherry and Nutella for dessert.
address: 40975 N Ironwood Dr #104, San Tan Valley, AZ 85140, USA

name: Laura's Burgers and More
notes: Chorizo burger
address: 60 E Western Ave, Avondale, AZ 85323, USA

name: New Lemongrass Taste of Vietnam
notes: Authentic Vietnamese flavors. Solid pho and vermicelli bowls.
address: 300 N Mead St #108, Wichita, KS 67202, USA

name: Thames Landing Oyster Bar
notes: State Street. Raw bar and fresh oysters. New London's waterfront gem.
address: 2 State St, New London, CT 06320, USA
